title: smallhold: private key stored plaintext in DB
description: In /home/mark/PROJECT/smallhold/src/db.rs line 47, the accounts table stores private_key_pem as plaintext TEXT. Same pattern as broadside — accepted per threat model (single-user server, SQLite file on same disk, encrypting at rest only protects against a narrower attack than full disk compromise). Noting for parity tracking.
close_reason: Moved to smallhold — accepted per threat model
